name: Fancy Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 Bag (16 oz) frozen cut green beans, thawed & drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the thawed and drained green beans, white vinegar, dried mint leaves, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
4. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 6-7 minutes until the beans are tender.
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish.
6. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts and crumbled Feta cheese.
